overall.description: First-person exploration through a neon-drenched cyberpunk alleyway in Night City, featuring traditional red paper lanterns juxtaposed with futuristic holograms and signage. The player walks through wet streets reflecting vibrant cyan and red neon lights, passing food stalls and vending machines before approaching an elevator in a commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk alley with street vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet neon-lit alley observing the surroundings

entered.detail: traditional red paper lanterns with Japanese characters hanging overhead in a series
wooden food stall structure with striped awning and counter
futuristic vending machine with glowing display and yellow warning stripes
wet asphalt reflecting red and cyan neon lights
various neon signs and holographic displays on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow wet alley adorned with traditional red paper lanterns and cyberpunk neon signage. A food stall structure is visible on the right while a futuristic vending machine sits on the left, with the wet asphalt reflecting the vibrant red lights overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon floor lighting

events.description: enters covered walkway with wooden pillars and cyan neon floor lights

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the covered arcade section with cyan floor lighting

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the covered walkway

entered.detail: metal and wood roof structure covering the walkway
thick wooden support pillars with red structural beams
glowing cyan neon light strips embedded in the floor along the walkway edges
large holographic billboard displaying advertisements on the left wall

segments.scene_description: Transitioning into a covered walkway with wooden support pillars and distinctive cyan neon floor lighting. The roof blocks most of the sky while red lanterns continue overhead, and a holographic advertisement becomes visible on the left wall as a pedestrian walks ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway overlooking lower street level

events.description: reaches elevated walkway with metal railing overlooking lower street
lighting shifts to mix of distant bright billboards and shadowed foreground

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated section while looking down at the lower street level

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
view down to lower street level with vehicles and pedestrians visible below
large illuminated digital billboard on distant building
yellow neon signs on the left side of the lower street

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated walkway with metal safety railings, overlooking a lower street level with activity below. Large digital billboards and yellow neon signage illuminate the distant background while the foreground remains in shadow, creating a contrast between the dark walkway and bright distant lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market plaza with food carts and stalls

events.description: turns left away from the overlook and continues through market area
passes metal stairs on left entering narrower corridor toward elevator

agents.ego_description: turning away from the overlook and walking through the market area toward the elevator

notable_agents.action: person standing near market stall on the right side

entered.detail: mobile food cart with glowing cyan lights and umbrella
open plaza area with multiple market stalls and neon signage
green metal staircase leading upward on the left side
various market stalls with awnings and merchandise displays

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the overlook into a more open market plaza area with food carts and various market stalls. Metal stairs lead upward on the left side as the path narrows into a corridor lined with red lanterns and neon signage, approaching the elevator area.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor leading to elevator with holographic signage

events.description: approaches elevator doors at end of corridor
stops at elevator control panel to call elevator

agents.ego_description: approaching the elevator doors and stopping at the control panel

entered.detail: metal elevator doors with red lighting above
digital control panel with call elevator button and display
glowing green holographic sign floating near the elevator

segments.scene_description: Approaching the end of the corridor where an elevator is located. Metal stairs are visible to the left while the camera focuses on the elevator doors and control panel, with a green holographic sign glowing in the background. The scene ends at the elevator control interface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit urban corridor that evolves from a narrow, wet alleyway into an elevated vantage point overlooking a bright commercial district. It begins by moving through a damp alley where red paper lanterns and cyberpunk signage cast vibrant reflections across the wet asphalt, passing a food stall and a futuristic vending machine. As the camera advances, the environment shifts into a covered walkway characterized by wooden support pillars and glowing cyan floor lighting, where a holographic advertisement flickers on the wall beside a passing pedestrian. The scene then opens up as the path transitions onto an elevated metal walkway, leaving the enclosed shadows behind. Finally, the perspective expands to overlook a lower street level, contrasting the dark foreground with the brilliant glow of large digital billboards and yellow neon signage in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling open market plaza into a narrow, neon-lit corridor that terminates at a futuristic elevator. It begins by turning away from an overlook to glide through a plaza filled with food carts and market stalls. As the path narrows, the camera moves past metal stairs on the left and enters a corridor lined with glowing red lanterns and vibrant neon signage. The scene then shifts focus toward the end of the passage, where a green holographic sign illuminates the background. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera closes in on the elevator doors and its glowing control interface.
